title: Reincarnated Without Memories
overview: Summoner Kelvin is reincarnated into another world after sacrificing all his memories for a variety of powerful skills. He's also brought the Goddess who reincarnated him with him, as his own personal summoned monster!

title: Dark Knight
overview: Kelvin gets wind of a powerful monster named a Blackghost Knight that's the perfect way for him to test his new skills. But his Appraising Eye tells him that the person who gave him the quest has the title "Murderer"...

title: A Secret Shared with the Guild, and a Slave Girl
overview: After defeating the Blackghost Knight, Kelvin now has powerful servants at his command. But he needs another party member, and he has his eyes set on a certain half-elf slave...

title: Demon
overview: After saving his friends from an arrogant noble, Kelvin is sent on an adventure to defeat a powerful demon.

title: Daughter of the Demon King
overview: Kelvin faces off with a powerful gluttony demon in the depths of a dungeon.

title: Rice and Thieves and Heroes
overview: Kelvin sets off on a new journey in search of more powerful foes... and rice?!

title: Battle with the Heroes
overview: Kelvin battles the heroes who are destined to save the world, and he has more than a few things to teach them.

title: Returning to Parth and the Goddess Arrives
overview: Kelvin trains the heroes in the ways of advanced combat tactics.

title: Hero Summoning
overview: After getting his own house and reunited with Melfina, Kelvin summons a new hero.

title: New Family
overview: Kelvin begins to power up his new family as he prepares for the next stage of his life.

title: Rank S Promotion Exam
overview: Kelvin heads to an elven village for his S Rank Promotion exam.

title: Another Reincarnator
overview: Kelvin fights another reincarnated warrior to protect the elven village.
